text:
- Changes:
  * GCC4 compatibility patches
  * Use of a temporary file to handle log rotation correctly.
    This gets rid of the NFS and noatime problem.

- Update to 0.10.3

Removed file(s):
- files/patch-lmtpconf.c
- files/patch-re-re.c
- files/patch-sieve-sievelex.c
